display.purpose: Landing hero — one use per page, maximum.

headline.purpose: H1 on internal screens. Strong declarations.

title.purpose: H2/H3, section headings, highlighted invoice names.

body.purpose: All body copy. Max 65ch. text-wrap: pretty on paragraphs.

label.purpose: Field labels, badges. Never decorative uppercase.

mono.purpose: RFC, amounts, folios, stamp dates. REQUIRED for financial data.

shadows.name: shadow-brand
shadows.purpose: Primary button and featured StampCard. One per screen.

shadows.name: shadow-accent
shadows.purpose: Viral green accent button. One per screen.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Exits and entrances. Default for most transitions.

motion.name: dur-slow
motion.purpose: Elements entering the viewport, page transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action for the screen. Tomate → Sangría gradient. One visible primary per view.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 20px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #CE0D2F 0%, #9F0824 100%); color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.01em; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(206,13,47,0.28); transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), filter 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.08); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(206,13,47,0.4); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.45; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Accent Button (Verde Viral)
components.description: Conversion CTA. Neon green on dark ink. For 'Cobrar ahora', 'Crear cuenta'.
components.css: .ds-btn-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 12px 20px; background: #C6F542; color: #182230; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.01em; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(169,217,43,0.35); transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), filter 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-accent:hover { filter: brightness(1.06); } .ds-btn-accent:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-accent:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(198,245,66,0.45); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action. White with warm-gray border. No visual prominence.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 12px 20px; background: #ffffff; color: #1A150F; border: 1.5px solid #D3CBDB; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.01em; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(26,21,15,0.06); transition: border-color 120ms, box-shadow 120ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #A99E8C; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(26,21,15,0.07); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(206,13,47,0.2); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary action. No border, no background. Brand typography only.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; padding: 12px 20px; background: transparent; color: #CE0D2F; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(206,13,47,0.06); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(206,13,47,0.2); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content surface. White on cream. Optional hover lift via interactive prop.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #E4D9C9; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(26,21,15,0.07); transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(26,21,15,0.09); } .ds-card-label { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #7E7260; margin: 0 0 6px; } .ds-card-value { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', monospace; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 600; color: #1A150F; letter-spacing: -0.01em; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; margin: 0; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: CFDI status indicator. Dot + label. Four tones: success, warning, danger, info.
components.html: TimbradaPendienteRechazadaBorrador
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-badge-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-badge--success { background: #DCFCE7; color: #0E6B47; } .ds-badge--success .ds-badge-dot { background: #16A34A; } .ds-badge--warning { background: #FEF9C3; color: #8A5A06; } .ds-badge--warning .ds-badge-dot { background: #CA8A04; } .ds-badge--danger { background: #FEE2E5; color: #9F0824; } .ds-badge--danger .ds-badge-dot { background: #9F0824; } .ds-badge--info { background: #EDE9FE; color: #5B21B6; } .ds-badge--info .ds-badge-dot { background: #7C3AED; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form field. Brand focus ring. Mono variant for RFC/amounts with Geist Mono.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-input-label { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #1A150F; } .ds-input-field { display: flex; align-items: center; background: #ffffff; border: 1.5px solid #D3CBDB; border-radius: 12px; padding: 0 14px; transition: border-color 120ms, box-shadow 120ms; } .ds-input-field:focus-within { border-color: #CE0D2F; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(206,13,47,0.15); } .ds-input { flex: 1; border: none; outline: none; background: transparent; padding: 12px 0; font-size: 15px; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #1A150F; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #A99E8C; }

components.name: StampCard — Stamp Pack
components.description: Core monetization component. CFDI stamp pack. Featured variant uses brand gradient.
components.css: .ds-stamp-card { position: relative; text-align: left; width: 100%; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-stamp-card--featured { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #CE0D2F 0%, #9F0824 100%); color: #ffffff; border: 2px solid transparent; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(206,13,47,0.28); } .ds-stamp-card--featured:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-stamp-ribbon { position: absolute; top: 14px; right: 14px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 999px; background: #C6F542; color: #182230; } .ds-stamp-qty { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 34px; letter-spacing: -0.02em; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-stamp-sub { font-size: 13px; opacity: 0.85; margin-top: 2px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-stamp-footer { margin-top: 16px; padding-top: 14px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-stamp-price { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 22px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-stamp-unit { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.7; }

narrative.overview:
Kipo is not accounting software — it's SAT bureaucracy transformed into a fast, human tool. The design system carries that promise in every visual decision: the screen that used to intimidate now acts, and acts fast. The identity is not borrowed from the American fintech sector or government portals; it speaks with its own red-and-cream accent.

The personality is Modern · Agile · Human. Modern through resolved information density, typographic weight, and clear hierarchy. Agile because the interface never puts unnecessary screens between the user and their task. Human through the visual temperature (warm cream, vivid red, generous typography) and a voice that doesn't condescend.
keyCharacteristics: Color as signature, not decoration: Kipo red appears on action, not as wallpaper.
Typography that acts: Plus Jakarta Sans carries the weight; Inter executes; Geist Mono measures.
Rhythmic spacing: 4px base scale, never arbitrary values.
Soft corners (12–16px) that say modern product without saying 2021 app.
Shadows that whisper: warm-tinted, low-profile, never the harsh black of Material 2014.
Financial data always in tabular monospaced — zero ambiguity about any figure.

rules.name: The One Red Rule
rules.body: The Tomate → Sangría gradient is Kipo's visual voice. Using it on more than one element per screen dilutes the signal. One primary CTA per view, not three.

rules.name: The Whisper Rule
rules.body: Shadows are contextual information, not decoration. A resting card has shadow-sm. Two elements competing in elevation is a design failure.

rules.name: The Three Voices Rule
rules.body: Display/Title is the one that speaks. Body is the one that explains. Mono is the one that signs. Mixing fonts outside these roles breaks hierarchy.

dos: Use Geist Mono + tabular-nums for all financial data: amounts, RFCs, folios, stamp dates.
Limit the Tomate → Sangría gradient to one action element per screen.
Use data-theme="dark" on premium landing sections.
Include prefers-reduced-motion for every entrance animation.
Label every CFDI status with the correct Badge tone: success=Timbrada, warning=Pendiente, danger=Rechazada, info=Borrador.
donts: Imitate Mexican government portals (SAT, IMSS): institutional blue, formless hierarchy, intimidating tables.
Replicate generic American SaaS: hero-metric, navy/gold gradient, stock photos, uppercase eyebrow above every section.
Use border-left greater than 1px as a color accent on cards or alerts.
Use background-clip: text with a gradient for decorative text.
Use Verde Viral on text smaller than 18px on a light background.
Show two elements with shadow-brand or shadow-accent simultaneously.
Use section numbers (01/02/03) as visual scaffolding when content is not an ordered sequence.
